SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

LONG NAME: SUBMTG_STATE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): All demographic and eligibility 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: FIPS state codes can be found at: https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi.html 

Two-digit value (with leading zeros) 
01: Alabama 
02: Alaska 
04: Arizona 
05: Arkansas 
06: California 
08: Colorado 
09: Connecticut 
10: Delaware 
11: District of Columbia 
12: Florida 
13: Georgia 
15: Hawaii 
16:
